data.title: 国际服活动「Secret Midnight Party: The Chimes of Tag」

data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

'Secret Midnight Party: The Chimes of Tag' event story is starting!

The last night of the year. Koyuki, reflecting in the Self-Reflection Room, and Sensei, overrun by a backlog of tasks, decide to join forces and play hooky. But their fun was short-lived. Unexpectedly, Yuuka and Noa return to Seminar early, and the scene quickly turns into a scramble as they chase each other...

#BlueArchive
